description: Writes actual marketing content: X threads, blog posts, emails, LinkedIn posts. Uses strategy.md and content-calendar.md. NOT for planning what to write.

cases.query: Write me a thread about why we built this product. I want it for X, punchy, with a strong hook and clear CTA at the end.
Create a LinkedIn post announcing our new feature. Keep it professional but not boring. Include a personal founder angle.
Draft an email for our waitlist. We're launching next week and I need something that creates excitement without being spammy.
Write a blog post explaining our technical approach. The audience is senior engineers who are skeptical of AI hype.
LinkedIn post please. I want to share the story of how we got our first 100 users and what we learned.
Help me write a launch announcement for Hacker News. It needs to be concise, technical, and avoid anything that sounds like marketing.
Create content for our product update. I want a short X post and a longer LinkedIn version covering the same news.
Write marketing copy for an email drip sequence. Three emails: welcome, value prop, and activation nudge.
I need a tweet thread breaking down our pricing philosophy. Something that explains why we're cheap compared to enterprise tools.
Draft a content piece about the problem we solve. I want something that resonates with founders who've felt this pain.
Create a hot take post for X about why most developer marketing is terrible. Tie it back to our approach.
Write me a case study post based on the feedback we got from our beta users. I'll give you the quotes.
What should I post this week? I need a plan with specific topics and a posting schedule for the next 4 weeks.
I need a content calendar. Map out themes for each week and tell me how many posts per platform.
How often should I post on LinkedIn? I need help figuring out my posting cadence and content mix.
Plan my marketing content for the month. I want themes, topics, and a schedule, not actual written posts.
Give me a weekly content rhythm. I want to know what types of posts to do on which days.
Review this post before I publish it. Is the voice right? Is the CTA strong enough?
Check if my blog post is ready to go live. I need someone to verify it matches our brand voice and strategy.
Review my marketing strategy. I want to know if my positioning is differentiated enough.
Publish this post to X right now. It's already written and reviewed.
How should I market this product? I have nothing yet and need help with the whole strategy from scratch.
Who are my competitors? I need a competitive analysis before I decide how to position myself.
